projectDescription: Uxia is an AI-powered user testing and research platform that delivers actionable UX insights in minutes using synthetic testers — no recruiting, scheduling, or moderation required.
keyFeatures: AI User Test — synthetic testers explore designs and surface UX frictions
AI Live Website Test — paste a URL and get instant UX feedback from AI testers
AI User Research — ask targeted questions to synthetic audiences for qualitative feedback
Accessibility Test — automated WCAG 2.2 AA/AAA compliance review
Human Test — turn any AI test into a shareable link for real human participants
Audience Enrichment — build synthetic audiences from your own persona data
Think-aloud Transcripts — detailed session commentary from every synthetic tester
UX Benchmarking — SUS, SUPR-Q, and Uxia Optimization Score metrics
Hybrid Research — combine synthetic and human testing in one platform
Instant Reports — actionable findings generated automatically after each test
publicApiSurface: Create test (AI User Test, AI Live Website, AI User Research, Accessibility Test, Human Test)
Define synthetic audience (demographics, psychographics, persona upload)
Launch test with mission, scenario, and designs/URL
Audience Enrichment via custom data upload
SUS / SUPR-Q / Uxia Optimization Score results
